prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含旧高考理科）最低位次约21351→22035→21517→30690→30543，2024年因新高考选科分组（再选化学与再选不限分开投档）导致位次大幅后 移约9000名，2025年基本持平于30543名，近两年基准位次稳定在3万名附近；该校在安徽省物理类招生计划2021年89人、2022年88人、2023年90人、2024年92人 、2025年91人；2026年计划87人，较2025年缩招4人（约-4.4%），缩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字有减小压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大 学排名2026年第113名，近年排名稳定在100–113区间，属中上游211层次；声誉文件中无大连海事大学显著负面或正面事件，舆情平稳；抖音学校热度总排名第5 0位，评价为“较热”，短视频曝光量中等，报考关注度一般；第五轮学科评估中该校无A-及以上学科，优势学科主要集中在交通运输工程、船舶与海洋工程等涉 海领域，整体学科实力处于211中游水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续高热，与该校招生专业高度重合，对理科考生吸引力 较强；安徽省2026年普通高考总人数约45.1万，较2025年总考生约46.2万减少约1.1万人，物理类考生估算约31.3万（较2025年32.1万减少约0.8万），竞争压力略有缓解；大连海事大学位于辽宁省，非本省高校，无显著地域偏好加成；该校在安徽省招生规模适中（ 约90人），属跨省招生正常水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次稳定在3万名附近、2026年缩招4人使竞争加剧、安徽省考生总数小幅减少缓解竞争、学校声誉平稳等因 素，预测2026年物理类最低位次约29708名，区间29208–30208名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including old Gaokao science) was approximately 21351 → 22035 → 21517 → 30690 → 30543. In 2024, due to the new Gaokao subject grouping (separate filing for Chemistry required and no subject requirement), the ranking dropped significantly by about 9000 places. In 2025, it remained roughly stable at 30543, with the baseline ranking stabilizing around 30,000 in the past two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Anhui Province for Physics Category was 89 in 2021, 88 in 2022, 90 in 2023, 92 in 2024, and 91 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 87, a reduction of 4 students compared to 2025 (about -4.4%), which slightly intensifies competition and puts downward pressure on the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 113th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 100–113 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. There are no significant negative or positive events concerning Dalian Maritime University in reputation documents; public opinion is stable. The university's Douyin popularity ranks 50th overall, rated as 'relatively hot', with moderate short video exposure and average application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no A- or above disciplines; its advantageous disciplines are mainly in transportation engineering, ship and ocean engineering, and other maritime-related fields, with overall disciplinary strength at the mid-level of 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular in society, and they overlap significantly with the university's enrollment majors, strongly attracting science students. The total number of ordinary Gaokao examinees in Anhui Province in 2026 is about 451,000, a decrease of about 11,000 from the 2025 total of about 462,000. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 313,000 (a decrease of about 8,000 from 321,000 in 2025), slightly easing competitive pressure. Dalian Maritime University is located in Liaoning Province, not a local university, so there is no significant regional preference advantage. The university's enrollment scale in Anhui Province is moderate (about 90 students), which is normal for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the stable ranking around 30,000 in 2024–2025, the reduction of 4 students in 2026 intensifying competition, the slight decrease in the total number of examinees in Anhui Province easing competition, and the stable university reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 29,708, with a range of 29,208–30,208.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 29,208–30,208, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 29,208), you can focus on competitive Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 30,208), you should prioritize Tier 3 majors as a safety net, choosing Law, Management Science and Engineering, and other majors with broad employment prospects.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including old Gaokao liberal arts) was approximately 2987 → 3264 → 3609 → 3626 → 4267, showing a continuous downward trend, with a cumulative decline of about 1280 positions over the past 5 years; in 2025, it declined by 641 positions compared to 2024, with an increased rate of decline; the enrollment plan for History Category in Anhui Province was 14 students from 2021 to 2023, and 13 students from 2024 to 2025; the 2026 plan is 13 students, unchanged from 2025, with no direct impact from plan changes on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 113th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with recent rankings stable in the 100–113 range, belonging to the mid-to-upper tier of 211 universities; no significant negative or positive events related to Dalian Maritime University in reputation documents, with stable public opinion; total popularity ranking on Douyin is 50th, rated as 'relatively popular', with moderate application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no A- or above disciplines, with overall discipline strength at the mid-level of 211 universities, and no outstanding advantages in liberal arts.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has a social popularity rating of 'recommended' (relatively hot), strongly attracting liberal arts candidates; Business Administration category is 'clearly discouraged', English/Foreign Languages is 'generally wait-and-see'; the total number of regular Gaokao examinees in Anhui Province in 2026 is about 451,000, with an estimated 138,000 History Category examinees (a decrease of about 3,400 from 145,000 in 2025), slightly easing competition pressure; Dalian Maritime University is located in Liaoning Province, not a local university in this province, with no significant regional preference advantage; the enrollment scale for History Category in Anhui Province is relatively small (about 13 students), which is normal for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight decrease in History Category examinees in Anhui Province easing competition, and the relatively hot popularity of the Law major, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 4247, with a range of 3747–4747.
